evidence.evidence_text: Effects of crushed glass cullet sizes, casting methods and pozzolanic materials on ASR of concrete blocks Gerry Lee, Tung-Chai Ling, Yuk-Lung Wong, Chi-Sun Poon ⇑ Department of Civil and Structural Engineering, The Hong Kong Polytechnic University, Hung Hom, Kowloon, Hong Kong, China article info Article history: Received 6 August 2010 Received in revised form 7 December 2010 Accepted 7 December 2010 Available online 3 January 2011 Keywords: Recycled glass Particle size distribution ASR Dry-mixe
